mapper.update: UPDATE `workflow_node_document_config` SET `workflow_node_id` = #{workflowNodeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `document_type_code` = #{documentTypeCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `document_type_name` = #{documentTypeName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `generate_timing` = #{generateTiming, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `template_code` = #{templateCode, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `snapshot_schema_json` = #{snapshotSchemaJson, jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, `snapshot_view_name` = #{snapshotViewName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `output_material_type_id` = #{outputMaterialTypeId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, `required` = #{required, jdbcType=TINYINT}, `enabled` = #{enabled, jdbcType=TINYINT} WHERE `document_config_id` = #{documentConfigId, jdbcType=BIGINT}
